description: Mastering Django through Projects is a repo of Django and Django REST framework projects to help developers improve their skills in full-stack and backend web development with Python.
Professional repository showcasing advanced development skills
Demo API built with express framework to demonstrate my devops skills
The project demonstrates core backend skills like RESTful API design, serializers, views, models, and proper HTTP method handling.
A clean and modular REST API for managing products, categories, and orders — built with Django REST Framework to showcase backend development skills.
This repository showcases my hands-on exploration of building RESTful APIs using Django, designed to strengthen my backend development skills.

SkillConnect is a digital platform that connects clients with skilled blue-collar workers in Addis Ababa. This backend API, built with Django and Django REST Framework, powers the platform’s core features
This project is a backend API built with .NET, created to help me practice and improve my skills in backend application development using the .NET framework.
This repository is for my practice with Django REST Frameworks. Here I develop and test RESTful APIs, exploring different features to enhance my backend development skills.
E-commerce API backend built with Django REST Framework to demonstrate full-stack API design and development skills.

This repository contains all about DRF API include: API CRUD, Auth, Permissions, Token Auth, and more extremely functionality of REST API. It also illustrate what I learned in Django Rest Framework that sharp my skills to built robust backend system.
Building a Simple Task Management API with Django REST Framework (DRF) small Task Management project to practice my backend development skills using Django REST Framework.

A Django REST Framework (DRF) learning project focused on building RESTful APIs with real-world features. Implements CRUD operations, custom pagination, filtering (django-filter), search, and ordering. Built to strengthen backend development skills and understand API design in Django.
A RESTful API for managing books, showcasing backend development skills using ASP.NET Core 9, Entity Framework Core, and SQL Server.

A RESTful backend API built with Django and Django REST Framework to power my personal portfolio. It exposes structured endpoints for professional profile data, skills, projects, experience, and contact messages, designed with clean architecture and scalability in mind.
Django REST Framework backend for candidate-job matching with dynamic filters (skills, location, experience, job role, and more). Built during Fusion Hack 2025.

Skill Speed is a Django REST Framework backend API designed to expose children (ages 5–15) to technology, craft, and vocational skills. The platform provides age-appropriate skill paths, structured lesson content, enrollment-controlled access, progress tracking, and AI-powered recommendations.
MzansiSkillsSeeker is a backend ASP.NET Core Web API that connects job seekers with short-term skill-based tasks. Built with JWT authentication, Entity Framework Core, and SQL Server.
A Diablo-inspired build tracker API for managing classes, skills, upgrades, and character builds using ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework.
Backend skill refresh and portfolio rebuild using Python and Django REST Framework. Focused on building production-ready APIs for international junior and internship roles (2026).

Ride-API is a RESTful API built using Django REST Framework (DRF) for managing ride-related data. This project serves as a demonstration of backend development skills for the Wingz Django Backend Developer Assessment.

SkillForge showcases my learning in Django REST Framework (DRF) and API integration with a frontend built in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Although I eventually paused the project due to a lack of interest in DRF, it reflects my initial exploration of backend and frontend integration.
A simpleDjango REST Framework (DRF) project for managing items.   It demonstrates CRUD operation, authentication, and CI automation— making it a great example of backend/API development skills
This is a Django REST Framework application designed to test your skills in backend development, focusing on data architecture, API performance optimization, and advanced filtering capabilities.
This project was built to show my current skills on backend programming, in this case The Laravel Framework is going to be used to built this API.
